description.text:
(Translated from Chinese by AI)
1. Fixed the issue where versions 26.2+ could not automatically fall back to OpenGL when Vulkan requirements were not met.
2. Fixed the freeze/crash issue when using the system's windowed game feature (small window) on phones with 26.2-snapshots.
3. Fixed the issue where the launcher would sometimes crash directly on some devices when opening.
4. Fixed the launcher crash when downloading mods without any version installed.
5. Corrected some text descriptions within the launcher.
6. Fixed the launcher crash caused by importing a corrupted layout file.

（若启动器内下载缓慢请使用网盘下载,64位的请下载arm64，不知道该下哪个的请下载all）
1.修复26.2+不满足Vulkan要求时无法自动使用OpenGL的问题
2.修复26.2-snapshots 使用手机系统小窗游戏功能运行时卡死崩溃的问题
3.修复部分设备打开启动器时有概率直接崩溃的问题
4.修复未安装版本时下载模组导致启动器崩溃的问题
5.修正启动器内部分文本描述
6.修复导入的布局文件损坏导致启动器崩溃的问题
